node.title: Twitter, Apple, and Uber Phone Screen

topic.title: Twitter, Apple, and Uber Phone Screen

post.content:
**Twitter**
I was asked variation of this problem:

Find median from data stream:
https://leetcode.com/problems/find-median-from-data-stream/

**Apple**
Exactly this problem:
https://leetcode.com/problems/android-unlock-patterns/

**Uber**
Variation of this one: 
https://leetcode.com/problems/regular-expression-matching/
hi. could you please explain about variations?? it is unclear, because some variations actually can cause problems.
